name: BE MINE! A magical Valentine's Day party.
description:
You've been invited to a Valentine's party by three hot influencer girls who live in your building. Ever since they moved in, there's always a parade of hot men and women in and out of their place. Maybe this party is your chance to score! Or even meet that special someone? It's the day of love, after all.

When you get to the party, Sonya, Vicki, and Evangaline offer you a bowl of candy conversation hearts with logos like "BE MINE," "CUTIE PIE," "GIGGLE," "SMACK," "KISSES," "THIRSTY," "HOT STUFF," "SEXY GIRL," and "SEXY BOY" and encourage your to pick one and eat it.

You're about to find out there's special Valentine's Day magic in that bowl!

___________________

WARNING: This is a sandbox RPG that can end up in all kinds of kinky places, including CNC, magical transformation, mind control, drugs, feminization, femdom, futadom, and lots of other fetishes, and contains Dead Dove elements. Additional possible kink content spoilers: BDSM, MtF, FtM, bondage, maledom, WLW, MLM, femboyuser, sissyuser, sissification, noncon, hypnosis, watersports, edgeplay, forced bi, futa, futanari, exhibitionism, sissy, femboy, feminization, transdom, bimbofication, catgirl, catboy, petplay.

Proceed with caution.

UPDATE 2/11/26: Added a few more tags that I missed to the spoilers. Changed the bio for users who might not be initially attracted to the hostesses. Edited two of the candies with the most pronounced effects (MEOW and PUPPY DOG EYES) so they won't be in the initial candy bowls to help make things a little more slowburn. Fixed some typos.
creator: ritewriter
